assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryIdentityResources with at least IdentityResources.OpenId() and IdentityResources.Profile()
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows AddInMemoryIdentityResources pattern for identity resources.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'weatherapi'
Program.cs defines a client with AllowedGrantTypes set to Code (authorization code with PKCE)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md covers client configuration with grant types.

assertions.assertion: The client configuration includes RedirectUris containing 'https://webapp.example.com/signin-oidc' and PostLogoutRedirectUris containing 'https://webapp.example.com/signout-callback-oidc'
assertions.rationale: With the skill providing patterns, specific URIs would be configured as requested.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs has the correct middleware pipeline ordering: UseIdentityServer after UseRouting and before UseAuthorization
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pipeline Ordering Rules clearly define this order.
